website_content.about_us: I am a passionate software engineer with 5+ years of experience building modern web applications using React, Node.js, and Cloud native tools. I love solving complex architecture problems and crafting pixel-perfect interfaces.

experience.title: Senior Web Developer
experience.desc: Leading a team of 4 front-end developers building next-generation SaaS products using Next.js and Tailwind.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.desc: Built and maintained custom e-commerce and cms platforms for startup clients globally.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.desc: Graduated with honors. Specialized in Web Systems and Databases.

projects.title: E-Commerce Analytics Dashboard

projects.title: Smart Task Organizer
projects.short_desc: Collaborative project management tool featuring drag-and-drop kanban boards and automatic notifications.

services.title: Web App Development
services.desc: Creating fast, custom-tailored, and scalable single-page web applications from scratch.

services.title: UI/UX Design Mockups
services.desc: Designing visually stunning, premium-grade layouts and interactive components.

template_data.hero_desc: Specializing in crafting premium, high-performance web applications and beautiful responsive user interfaces.
